default.title: Services and Cardholders
default.content: Dear patients, HealthierSG, MSG@gov, Baby Bonus (CDA), CDC Vouchers & Teleconsultation are now available! We are also PHPC accredited & welcome the following card holders - CHAS, Pioneer, Merdeka, Alliance Healthcare, iHP, Mednefit & Raffles!

default.title: Clinic Operating Hours
default.content: Our clinic opens daily with extended evening consultations. Please book ahead for chronic care and preventive screening slots.

default.title: New Health Packages
default.content: Comprehensive family and women wellness packages are now available. Contact us to get personalized recommendations.
